prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约14767→15751→28881→24309→23204名，2023年出现明显跳升后近两年逐步回落，2025年基准约23204名，整体呈波动后移趋势；该校在河南省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年45人、2022年46人、2023年48人、2024年47人、2025年44人，2026年大幅增至69人，较2025年扩招约56.8%，扩招幅度显著，竞争压力理论上有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年稳定在82–84名区间（2026年约第82名），属全国知名传媒类顶尖高校；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学获评A++等级）；2026年声誉偏负面（宿舍火灾事件引发关注）；抖音热度排名第11位（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；新闻传播学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校招生专业高度关联；此外计算机、电子信息等工科专业虽无单独学科评估，但依托传媒行业背景具有特色优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，对理科考生吸引力强；新闻传播类专业受张雪峰效应影响呈明显劝退态势；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（不确定标记），按近年比例估算物理类考生约73.4万，较2025年55.5万增加约32%，考生规模大幅增长加剧整体竞争；该校位于北京市，非河南省本地高校，对河南考生具有较强跨省吸引力；近年该校在河南招生计划占比呈上升趋势，2026年扩招进一步体现对河南生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招（+56.8%）与河南省物理类考生大幅增加（约+32%）的双向作用，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，位次理论上应后移；但抖音高热关注度、计算机/电子信息类专业热度上升以及考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧，部分抵消扩招效应。经综合权衡，预测2026年理科最低位次约30915名，区间30415–31415名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 14767 → 15751 → 28881 → 24309 → 23204. In 2023, there was a significant jump, followed by a gradual decline over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 23204, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for science (physics category) was 45 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 44 in 2025. In 2026, it will significantly increase to 69, an expansion of about 56.8% compared to 2025. The expansion is substantial, theoretically easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has been stable in the 82–84 range in recent years (approximately 82nd in 2026). It is a nationally renowned top media university. In 2025, its reputation was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++ level). In 2026, its reputation was relatively negative (dormitory fire incident attracted attention). Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. No obvious record of admission gaps. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly related to the university's enrollment majors. Additionally, engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information, though without separate discipline evaluations, have distinctive advantages based on the media industry background.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science and Electronic Information/Communication Engineering majors are highly recommended by society, strongly attracting science candidates. Journalism and Communication majors are significantly discouraged due to the Zhang Xuefeng effect. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is about 1.2 million (uncertain mark). Based on recent years' proportions, it is estimated that there are about 734,000 physics category candidates, an increase of about 32% compared to 555,000 in 2025. The significant growth in candidate numbers intensifies overall competition. The university is located in Beijing, not a local university in Henan Province, and has strong cross-provincial appeal to Henan candidates. In recent years, the proportion of enrollment plans for this university in Henan has been on the rise. The 2026 expansion further reflects the emphasis on Henan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the dual effects of the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+56.8%) and the substantial increase in physics category candidates in Henan Province (approximately +32%), the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, so the ranking should theoretically move backward. However, the high Douyin attention, rising popularity of Computer Science and Electronic Information majors, and intensified competition due to the surge in candidate numbers partially offset the expansion effect. After comprehensive weighing, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be approximately 30915, with a range of 30415–31415.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 30415–31415, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 30415), you can focus on sprinting for popular engineering majors such as Digital Media Technology and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is in the middle of the range, it is recommended to prioritize interdisciplinary majors such as Advertising (Computational Advertising) and Big Data Management and Application. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, you can focus on Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1511 → 2452 → 2482 → 4196 → 2500. In 2024, there was a noticeable backward shift (4196), but it stabilized to 2500 in 2025, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend, with the baseline around 2400–2500 in recent three years. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan Province was 20 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 16 in 2025, and significantly increased to 27 in 2026, an expansion of about 68.75% compared to 2025, which is substantial.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 82nd on the Soft Science main list, a nationally renowned top media university. In 2025, the reputation was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++ level); in 2026, the reputation was relatively negative (dormitory fire incident). Douyin popularity ranked 11th (high heat), with high application attention. No record of admission gaps. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top nationally), directly corresponding to the university's core liberal arts enrollment majors (Journalism, Communication, Advertising, etc.), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and Communication majors were significantly discouraged due to the Zhang Xuefeng effect (2023), but recovered to general observation in 2024. Chinese Language and Literature major has a relatively high social popularity and is recommended. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million, with an estimated 466,000 history category candidates based on recent proportions, an increase of about 32% from 352,000 in 2025, showing a significant growth in candidate numbers. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Henan liberal arts candidates. The significant enrollment expansion in 2026 reflects the emphasis on Henan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the dual effects of the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+68.75%) and the substantial increase in history category candidates in Henan Province (+32%), the expansion rate is significantly greater than the candidate growth rate, theoretically leading to a noticeable backward shift in rankings. However, the low social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors (discouraging trend) may further suppress application enthusiasm, while high Douyin attention and Beijing's regional appeal provide some support. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is approximately 3431, with a range of 2931–3931.
